description:
Add a git component in dashboard that lets you see recent commits, diffs, worktrees, and full features git management tasks. View and manage branches. Pull and push and etc

(Duplicated from KB-030)

summary: Successfully integrated GitManagerModal into the dashboard UI. All 15 GitManagerModal tests pass, TypeScript compiles without errors, and build completes successfully. No new test failures introduced.
